given: a warehouse operator viewing the SKU detail view for a SKU that holds stock
when: one of that SKU's location entries is read
then: the entry displays the combined inventory_code (tracking code) recorded for that (SKU, location) stock record
architectural_notes: E2E: the combined inventory_code is a persisted NOT NULL column on stock_records (PI2), read by app/repositories, passed through app/services unchanged, serialized in the app/routes JSON payload, and rendered per location entry by the React SPA. No transformation or business rule lives in the boundary; the tracking code is a straight field projection. Verified over the R4 branch read: seeded rows carry an inventory_code and each detail entry surfaces it.

independence.rationale: AC1 asserts every location where the SKU is held appears; this adds the distinct outcome that each entry surfaces its combined inventory_code, which can fail (code omitted) while all locations still list correctly, and can pass while a location is missing.
